description: Round-1 machine-readable coverage ledger for AiUE test governance.

coverage_axes.summary: Kernel host minimum visual proof is covered by the current V1 latest report.
Demo host native control roundtrip is covered by the current E2/T2 request surface and latest demo evidence.
Current verification focuses on the two known ready bundles, not arbitrary bundle scale.
Two ready bundles are exercised, but broad character diversity is not yet established; DV1 will promote this when automated diversity evidence is recorded.
Weapon flow is proven on the current ready path, but not across a wider asset variety; DV1 will promote this when automated diversity evidence is recorded.
Clothing coverage exists, but it is still centered on the current hair fixture path; DV1 will keep this honest as automation expands.
FX coverage exists, but only on the current controlled fixture path; DV1 will keep this honest as automation expands.
Material and texture loading have not yet been promoted into the primary verified path; M1 will clear this once its latest report passes.
The playable demo path is exercised through tests, but has not yet been manually validated as a played demo; PV1 will clear this once a manual signoff passes.
Action preview is proven on a fixed verified path, but broader action variation is not yet covered; DV1 will update this from automated demo matrix evidence.
Animation preview is proven on selected presets, not across a wider animation family surface; DV1 will update this from automated demo matrix evidence.
